creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Oct 25 18:25:55 2013
New Revision: 331621
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331621

Log:
  www/py-django-registration-defaults: update to 0.4.4
  
  - Update to 0.4.4
  - Allow staging
  
  PR:		ports/183283
  Submitted by:	Kozlov Sergey <kozlov.sergey.404 gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/Makefile
  head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/distinfo

Modified: head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/Makefile	Fri Oct 25 18:18:33 2013	(r331620)
+++ head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/Makefile	Fri Oct 25 18:25:55 2013	(r331621)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	django-registration-defaults
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.4
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,5 +17,4 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}djan
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/distinfo	Fri Oct 25 18:18:33 2013	(r331620)
+++ head/www/py-django-registration-defaults/distinfo	Fri Oct 25 18:25:55 2013	(r331621)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (django-registration-defaults-0.4.3.tar.gz) = efdf1ae8c2d430e59bce13f69a2d5a27a90edada1c36b68c3a2399f9107d924f
-SIZE (django-registration-defaults-0.4.3.tar.gz) = 3285
+SHA256 (django-registration-defaults-0.4.4.tar.gz) = a4be4e6e07d67d1a801239669fa12c13413e219b74d5a719e208ca8dc1cca1c3
+SIZE (django-registration-defaults-0.4.4.tar.gz) = 3627
